EXPERIMENT.author: aiwithjainam
EXPERIMENT.text_preview:
BREAKING: Claude can now research like a Stanford PhD student.

Here are 9 insane Claude prompts that turn 40+ research
EXPERIMENT.one_liner: Claude can be used to generate literature reviews and knowledge maps from numerous research papers via advanced prompting, offering a faster alternative to traditional research methods.
EXPERIMENT.reason: While we use Claude for planning, the prompt-based literature review and knowledge map generation is a novel application. This aligns with our active build of an autonomous daily bookmark monitor and complements our cross-model review experiments by providing structured data for downstream analysis.
EXPERIMENT.proposed_action: Test the prompts on a focused set of our archived data (e.g., a specific project in the hall-of-fake repo) to assess the quality of generated literature reviews and knowledge maps.
